scripts.map:build: node tools/map-pipeline/omap2geojson.mjs && node tools/map-pipeline/course-geojson.mjs && node tools/map-pipeline/render.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test -w @orienteering/verification-core && npm run test -w @orienteering/run-engine
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @orienteering/verification-core && npm run typecheck -w @orienteering/run-engine && npm run typecheck -w @orienteering/mobile
